docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAMBIAR, AMIT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. $1,259.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,359.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF AMIT NAMBIAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY DARIAN SHEPARD (LEGAL INVESTIGATION SUPERVISOR). DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY NAMBIAR, AMIT AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $25) SERVED OCT-29-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2021 - JUDGMENT.
